etsy_description:
Built To Serve — Romans 12:11 Christian Streetwear Tee

A bold Christian streetwear tee for men and women who want their faith to look clean, modern, and wearable beyond Sunday morning.

Design:
- Front graphic: “BUILT TO SERVE” with Romans 12:11 reference
- Premium modern-vintage typography with subtle sunrise/cross details
- Faith-forward without looking generic or cheesy

Product details:
- Unisex jersey tee recommended
- Soft cotton or cotton-blend shirt
- Front print, centered chest, approximately 11–12 inches wide
- Recommended launch colors: washed black, cream/ivory, forest, navy
- Sizes: S–2XL to start

Great for:
- Everyday Christian streetwear
- Church volunteers and ministry teams
- Father’s Day, birthday, youth ministry, or encouragement gifts
- Faith-based entrepreneurs and servants/leaders

Production note:
Final blank, provider, print method, mockups, shipping profile, and launch price must be reviewed before publishing. Final artwork must use owned/licensed fonts and graphics only.
